reports.description: Very brief and weak tornado touched down near a suburban house near Záluží at 12:43 UTC. A CCTV camera facing the garden captured strong winds, with outdoor furniture being lifted and blown toward the camera. Trees were first bent toward the west, and after the vortex passed, they shifted direction again, suggesting a small, concentrated rotating wind field rather than straight-line winds.
